steps.title: Set up the distance inequality
steps.content:
Ty walks at 4 km/h for h hours, covering a distance of $4h$ kilometers. Since he must walk at least 24 kilometers, we write:

$$4h \geq 24$$

steps.title: Solve for minimum hours
steps.content:
Divide both sides by 4:

$$h \geq 6$$

The minimum number of hours is 6. That matches choice B — B is correct.
